description: User clicks a social/contact link in the 3D footer (LinkedIn, GitHub, Scholar, Email)
User enters a 3D portal section (Work or Projects) by clicking a grid tile
User exits the active portal section by pressing Escape or clicking the close button
User hovers or taps a project tile to expand its details
User clicks the VIEW button to open a project URL in a new tab
User toggles the site theme using the theme switcher
